name: pwa
description: Офлайн-карта общественного транспорта Петропавловска-Камчатского с реалтайм-данными, GTFS-расписанием и планировщиком маршрутов.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:gtfs
scripts.test:unit: vitest run tests/unit/utils.test.js tests/unit/weather.test.js tests/unit/favorite-stops.test.js tests/unit/transport-conditions.test.js tests/unit/planner.test.js tests/unit/vehicle-visibility.test.js tests/unit/vehicle-icons.test.js tests/unit/stop-departures.test.js tests/unit/stop-card.test.js
scripts.test:gtfs: vitest run tests/unit/gtfs.test.js tests/unit/gtfs-i18n.test.js tests/unit/gtfs-search.test.js tests/unit/stop-focus.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:gtfs && npm run test:e2e
